title: Leaf Optimizations
description: Removes the annoying "Falling Leaves" textures from Vanilla Minecraft and gives slightly better FPS
body:
Leaf Optimizations is a minimal resource pack with one simple goal: kill the leaf particle lag.
Falling leaf particles are a surprisingly common FPS killer — they spawn constantly around trees, pile up quickly, and can tank your framerate in forested areas. This pack replaces those particles with fully transparent textures, making them invisible and giving your game a clean performance boost with zero other changes.

⚡ What It Does

Removes falling leaf particles — the tiny leaves that drift down from tree canopies
Boosts FPS in forested biomes, wooded areas, and anywhere with heavy tree cover
No visual changes to blocks, items, mobs, or UI — purely particle-focused


🎯 Who Is This For?

Players on lower-end hardware looking for easy FPS gains
Anyone who finds leaf particles visually distracting
Pack stackers who want a lightweight performance layer to add to any setup


📦 Compatibility
Compatible with OptiFine, Iris, Sodium, and virtually any other client-side mod or pack. Just drop it at the top of your resource pack list for best results.

🔧 Installation

Download the .zip — do not unzip it
Go to Options → Resource Packs in Minecraft
Click Open Pack Folder and drop the file in
Enable it and move it to the top of your active packs
Done — enjoy smoother gameplay in the woods!
